commands.author: steipete

target.title: fix(agents): add .catch() to fire-and-forget subagent lifecycle promises
target.body:
## Problem

Subagent lifecycle completion can reject after terminal run state is written but before cleanup starts. In that half-ended state the run has `endedAt`/`outcome`, but `cleanupHandled` and `cleanupCompletedAt` are still unset, so parent delivery or final cleanup can be skipped until a later resume path happens to recover it.

## Fix

- Add one central `completeSubagentRunWithRecovery` wrapper that mirrors the existing run-manager recovery contract: complete once, retry once, then route ended-but-not-cleaned runs through `resumeSubagentRun`.
- Use that wrapper for every non-run-manager completion path: pending lifecycle error, pending lifecycle timeout, lifecycle killed, lifecycle blocked, lifecycle ok, sweeper session-completion recovery, sweeper lost-context recovery, and explicit interrupted-run finalization.
- Keep recovery on the existing resume/orphan/announce-cleanup seam instead of adding a parallel orphan source.
- Drop unrelated generated UI i18n baseline churn.

## Verification

- **Behavior addressed**: failed subagent lifecycle completions no longer leave ended runs stuck before cleanup/final delivery; killed, blocked, ok, timeout, sweeper, and explicit failed-mark paths share the same recovery wrapper
- **Real environment tested**: macOS arm64 local test runner; Blacksmith Testbox remote changed check
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-registry.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.lifecycle-retry-grace.e2e.test.ts
  pnpm changed:lanes --json
  pnpm check:changed
  .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  Test Files  2 passed (2)
       Tests  68 passed (68)
  ```
  `pnpm check:changed` passed via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksksytyrfxscxs78e8f3eegk`.
  Autoreview reported: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.
- **Observed result after fix**: the regression test forces two real `completeSubagentRun` pre-cleanup rejections on the lifecycle killed path and verifies the run still reaches `cleanupCompletedAt`; timeout-grace tests verify aborted lifecycle end events become timeout completions and are canceled by later successful end events
- **What was not tested**: live gateway multi-agent session with a real hook/runtime failure; covered here by focused fault injection plus the remote changed gate
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: re_review already completed after this command

commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3c8865ef380489bbb5d16643ce248abf0d500b4d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds catch handlers and delayed recovery for subagent lifecycle completion promises, widens the orphan-reconciliation source union, and adds regression coverage for lifecycle catch recovery and timeout grace.

PR surface: Source +101, Tests +109. Total +210 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main has fire-and-forget lifecycle completions without catch recovery, and completeSubagentRun persists terminal state before the cleanup tail can start; I did not run a live gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor and maintainer follow-up is needed because the patch still has a killed-branch recovery bug and the external-PR proof gate requires evidence from the contributor's real OpenClaw setup.

- **Real environment tested**: macOS arm64 local test runner; Blacksmith Testbox remote changed check
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-registry.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.lifecycle-retry-grace.e2e.test.ts
  pnpm changed:lanes --json
  pnpm check:changed
  .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  Test Files  2 passed (2)
       Tests  68 passed (68)
  ```
  `pnpm check:changed` passed via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksksytyrfxscxs78e8f3eegk`.
  Autoreview reported: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.
- **Observed result after fix**: the regression test forces two real `completeSubagentRun` pre-cleanup rejections on the lifecycle killed path and verifies the run still reaches `cleanupCompletedAt`; timeout-grace tests verify aborted lifecycle end events become timeout completions and are canceled by later successful end events
- **What was not tested**: live gateway multi-agent session with a real hook/runtime failure; covered here by focused fault injection plus the remote changed gate

commands.author: SebTardif

target.title: fix(agents): add .catch() to fire-and-forget subagent lifecycle promises
target.body:
## Problem

Subagent lifecycle completion can reject after terminal run state is written but before cleanup starts. In that half-ended state the run has `endedAt`/`outcome`, but `cleanupHandled` and `cleanupCompletedAt` are still unset, so parent delivery or final cleanup can be skipped until a later resume path happens to recover it.

## Fix

- Add one central `completeSubagentRunWithRecovery` wrapper that mirrors the existing run-manager recovery contract: complete once, retry once, then route ended-but-not-cleaned runs through `resumeSubagentRun`.
- Use that wrapper for every non-run-manager completion path: pending lifecycle error, pending lifecycle timeout, lifecycle killed, lifecycle blocked, lifecycle ok, sweeper session-completion recovery, sweeper lost-context recovery, and explicit interrupted-run finalization.
- Keep recovery on the existing resume/orphan/announce-cleanup seam instead of adding a parallel orphan source.
- Drop unrelated generated UI i18n baseline churn.

## Verification

- **Behavior addressed**: failed subagent lifecycle completions no longer leave ended runs stuck before cleanup/final delivery; killed, blocked, ok, timeout, sweeper, and explicit failed-mark paths share the same recovery wrapper
- **Real environment tested**: macOS arm64 local test runner; Blacksmith Testbox remote changed check
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-registry.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.lifecycle-retry-grace.e2e.test.ts
  pnpm changed:lanes --json
  pnpm check:changed
  .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
  ```
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  Test Files  2 passed (2)
       Tests  68 passed (68)
  ```
  `pnpm check:changed` passed via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01ksksytyrfxscxs78e8f3eegk`.
  Autoreview reported: `autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`.
- **Observed result after fix**: the regression test forces two real `completeSubagentRun` pre-cleanup rejections on the lifecycle killed path and verifies the run still reaches `cleanupCompletedAt`; timeout-grace tests verify aborted lifecycle end events become timeout completions and are canceled by later successful end events
- **What was not tested**: live gateway multi-agent session with a real hook/runtime failure; covered here by focused fault injection plus the remote changed gate
